result.stdout:
Description:
  CLI for querying NuGet information

Usage:
  Valleysoft.NuGetPackageSpy [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  package  Commands for querying a package
  graph    Commands for computing NuGet package graphs

result.stdout:
Description:
  Commands for computing NuGet package graphs

Usage:
  Valleysoft.NuGetPackageSpy graph [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  path <framework> <source-name> <source-version> <target-name> <target-version>  Calculates the path in a dependency graph between two packages

result.stdout:
Description:
  Calculates the path in a dependency graph between two packages

Usage:
  Valleysoft.NuGetPackageSpy graph path <framework> <source-name> <source-version> <target-name> <target-version> [options]

Arguments:
  <framework>       Target framework used to resolve dependencies
  <source-name>     Name of the source package
  <source-version>  Version of the source package
  <target-name>     Name of the target package
  <target-version>  Version of the target package

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

  <source-version>  Version of the source package
  <target-name>     Name of the target package
  <target-version>  Version of the target package

Commands:

Description:
  Get details of a package

Usage:
  Valleysoft.NuGetPackageSpy package info <name> <version> [options]

Arguments:
  <name>     Name of the package
  <version>  Version of the package

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
